## Recipes.IRecipeMoldRef type

Reference to a mold that can be used with a recipe. Contains the mold ID and optional notes.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type IRecipeMoldRef = IRefWithNotes<MoldId>;
```
**References:** [IRefWithNotes](./ts-chocolate.irefwithnotes.md)<!-- -->, [MoldId](./ts-chocolate.moldid.md)
